hero_title_accent: Audit Readiness for Hong Kong VASPs

problem_title: Audit readiness falters across scattered evidence
problem_description: Hong Kong VASPs face challenges gathering consistent, audit-ready evidence due to fragmented provider outputs and manual workflows. This complicates compliance reviews and weakens the traceability needed for jurisdiction-specific regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider data, regulatory rule updates, reviewer actions and evidence into one structured workflow that compliance teams use to prepare audit-ready records for Hong Kong VASP inspections.
workflow_title: From provider checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific provider outputs through rules, cases, decisions and evidence to support audit-ready compliance workflows for Hong Kong VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Hong Kong VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides Hong Kong VASPs with a compliance layer that connects provider outputs, regulatory rule monitoring and case management into structured workflows supporting local policies and audit preparation.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support audit readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures and links cases, alerts, decisions and evidence in a traceable workflow designed to meet Hong Kong audit expectations and regulatory review readiness.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Hong Kong compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages with audit logs to support clear, defensible records for Hong Kong regulatory inspections and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational platform without replacing them, enabling multi-provider orchestration and connected compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule, KYC and other providers, turning their outputs into structured evidence, regulatory updates, cases and reports without replacing the underlying systems.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready evidence for Hong Kong compliance
final_description: Review how SFTY structures multi-provider outputs into controlled workflows, case evidence and regulatory rule updates for Hong Kong VASPs.
